Hours_Studied.description: Number of hours spent studying per week

Parental_Involvement.description: Level of parental involvement in the student's education (Low, Medium, High)

Access_to_Resources.description: Availability of educational resources (Low, Medium, High)

Sleep_Hours.description: Average number of hours of sleep per night

Motivation_Level.description: Student's level of motivation (Low, Medium, High)

Tutoring_Sessions.description: Number of tutoring sessions attended per month

Teacher_Quality.description: Quality of the teachers (Low, Medium, High)

Peer_Influence.description: Influence of peers on academic performance (Positive, Neutral, Negative)

Physical_Activity.description: Average number of hours of physical activity per week

Parental_Education_Level.description: Highest education level of parents (High School, College, Postgraduate)

Distance_from_Home.description: Distance from home to school (Near, Moderate, Far)
